name: Sour Cream Pumpkin Pie
recipeIngredient: Mrs. J.B. Eoff's Baked 9-inch Pie Shell
recipeInstructions:
1. Soften gelatin in cold water.
2. Beat egg yolks with 1/3 cup sugar until thick and lemon-colored.
3. Add pumpkin puree, sour cream, and spices to the yolk mixture. Cook over medium heat, stirring constantly until the mixture comes to a boil.
4. Reduce heat and cook for an additional 2 minutes while stirring constantly.
5. Remove from heat and stir in the softened gelatin until dissolved.
6. Cool the mixture completely.
7. Beat egg whites with remaining sugar until foamy. Gradually add in the beaten egg whites, beating until stiff peaks form and sugar is dissolved.
8. Gently fold the whipped egg white mixture into the pumpkin mixture.
9. Stir together powdered sugar and vanilla in a separate bowl.
10. Pour half of the pumpkin mixture into the cooled pie shell.
11. Spread half of the whipped cream mixture on top.
12. Repeat with remaining ingredients.
13. Sprinkle toasted pecans over the top layer.
14. Chill at least two hours before serving.
